name: Navigation from Login page to Registration page

steps.name: Clicking link with name Registration and "data-testid=<Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://nikita-filonov.github.io/qa-automation-engineer-ui-course/#/auth/login'> selector='internal:testid=[data-testid="login-page-registration-link"s] >> nth=0'>" at index" 0"
Checking that current URL matches the URL .*/#/auth/registration
Check that registration form is visible
